title: Raising Jewish Children When You're a Convert
title_zh: 皈依者如何养育犹太孩子
cultural_parallels: Chinese concept of 言传身教 (teaching through words and actions)
Confucian educational ideal: 学而时习之,不亦说乎
Chinese appreciation for 传承 (passing down traditions)
先天 vs 后天 (innate vs acquired nature)
key_sources: Talmud Taanit 7a - learning from teachers and students
Talmud Yevamot 47b - convert as newborn child
Torah commandments to love the convert (36 times)
target_audience: Converts raising Jewish children, prospective converts considering parenthood
themes: The unique advantages convert parents bring
Creating Jewish memories without inherited traditions
Building confidence in children's Jewish identity
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
